name: Community Connect: Bronx Information Portal
note: The ONLY NYC Open Data asset whose Dataset-Information_Agency = 'City University of New York (CUNY)'. It is an external-link (href) BigApps entry to a Lehman College / CUNY Bronx information portal — not a machine-readable dataset. CUNY's institutional data does not live on NYC Open Data.

name: CUNY Community College Expenditures By Source
note: The only CUNY-SUBJECT dataset on NYC Open Data, but it is tagged to the Mayor's Office of Management & Budget (OMB), not CUNY — a budget rollup of the city's contribution to CUNY community colleges. Not academic/institutional data.
